summary: Comprehensive testing of Daily Map Sessions NEW FEATURES (Calendar, Source Selector, Batch Entry). Backend: 15/15 tests pass (100%). Frontend: All 3 new features verified working correctly via Playwright automation.

issues: Using browser's native date picker instead of shadcn calendar component - acceptable for MVP

backend: GET /api/floors - Returns floors list for dropdown (2 floors)
GET /api/map-sessions?floor_id=... - Returns sessions with date and status for calendar
POST /api/admin/map-sessions clone_from='empty' - Creates session with 0 zones
POST /api/admin/map-sessions clone_from='master' - Creates session cloning from master zones
POST /api/admin/map-sessions clone_from=session_id - Creates session cloning from specific session
POST /api/admin/map-sessions/batch - Creates 3 sessions for date range (3 days)
POST /api/admin/map-sessions/batch - Skips existing days correctly (created 2, skipped 1)
POST /api/admin/map-sessions/batch clone_from='empty' - Creates empty sessions with 0 zones
POST /api/admin/map-sessions/batch validates date range - Rejects end_date before start_date
Sessions include status field (draft/completed) for calendar dots
Sessions include date in YYYY-MM-DD format for calendar mapping
frontend: Monthly calendar displays 'فبراير 2026' (February 2026) with Arabic weekday names
Calendar shows amber dots on days with draft sessions (12, 13, 14, 15, 22)
Clicking day with session (22) selects it and shows session details
Clicking empty day (5) opens new session dialog with date pre-filled (02/05/2026)
New session dialog shows 4 source options: Auto, Master Map, Specific Tour, Empty
Batch entry button opens batch dialog
Batch dialog has start date, end date, and source selector
Batch dialog shows day count (3 يوم) based on date range
Session cards show status badge (مسودة = draft)

seed_data_creation: 5 existing sessions in database (Feb 12, 13, 14, 15, 22). Test sessions created and cleaned up during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Three new features fully tested: 1) Monthly Calendar View - shows Feb 2026 with Arabic weekdays, amber dots for draft sessions, green for completed, navigation arrows work, clicking empty day opens new session dialog with date pre-filled, clicking day with session selects it. 2) Enhanced Source Selector - 4 options (Auto, Master Map, Specific Tour, Empty) all working via backend API. 3) Batch Entry - date range input, source selector, day count display, backend creates sessions correctly and skips existing days. Previous features (zone edit, notes, complete/reopen, compare) verified still working.

monthly_calendar_view.details: Calendar shows Feb 2026 with Arabic weekday names, amber/green dots for sessions, navigation works, click empty day opens dialog

enhanced_source_selector.details: 4 source options (auto/master/empty/specific) visible in dialog, backend APIs support all clone_from values

batch_entry_mode.details: Dialog opens with date range inputs, source selector, shows day count. Backend batch endpoint creates sessions and skips existing days

previous_features_regression.details: Zone edit, complete/reopen, notes, compare all still working
